steps.title: Identify the conversion factor
steps.content: We are given that 1 kilogram = 1,000 grams. To convert from kilograms to grams, multiply by this factor.

steps.title: Multiply the mass by the conversion factor
steps.content:
The anteater's mass is 42 kilograms. Applying the conversion:
$$42 \text{ kg} \times 1,000 \frac{\text{grams}}{\text{kg}} = 42,000 \text{ grams}$$
The giant anteater's mass is 42,000 grams.
